series_metadata.series_description: Used to establish descriptive information for each capital project and to update perviously entered capital projects data.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all descrepancies are resolved, then destroy. For phased projects, retain until the final segment is complete and audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy., Paper: Other
